/usr/bin/ar qc libocudu_gateway.a CMakeFiles/ocudu_gateway.dir/sctp_socket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_gateway.dir/sctp_network_gateway_common_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_gateway.dir/sctp_network_client_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_gateway.dir/sctp_network_server_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_gateway.dir/udp_network_gateway_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_gateway.dir/sctp_network_client_factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_gateway.dir/sctp_network_server_factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_gateway.dir/udp_network_gateway_factory.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libocudu_gateway.a
